title: Lalita Sahasranama
notes: Very long (1000 names); namavali vs stotram forms, used stotram form. Original Sanskrit and IAST sourced 2026-07-14 from Sanskrit Documents (transliterated by M. Giridhar), converted via indic_transliteration; includes nyasa and dhyana preamble plus all 182.5 stotram verses (1000 names). Note: source hyphenates compound-name boundaries within each Devanagari/IAST line (e.g. shrImat-siMhAsaneshvarI); kept as fetched rather than silently smoothed, flagged for editorial decision.

title: Purusha Suktam

ASSUMPTION FLAGGED, same open question as S007: source carries Vedic svara (accent) marks, stored here WITHOUT accents (plain text) since the accent notation caused transliteration artifacts and no house convention for marking svara has been decided; needs an explicit yes/no decision, not stored as accented.
